ARAMARK SPORTS AND ENTERTAINMENT SERVICES, LLC
CATERING SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is between Aramark Sports and Entertainment Services, LLC
("Caterer") and the American Kennel Club Association ("Client").

Section 1 - SCOPE OF SERVICES
Caterer shall provide exclusive catering services for all scheduled meals
and refreshment breaks during the event period September 4-6, 2026.
Services include food preparation, service staffing, setup, and cleanup.

Section 2 - PRICING
Breakfast: $35 per person
Lunch: $45 per person
Dinner: $65 per person
Refreshment breaks: $18 per person per break
All prices subject to 20% service charge and applicable sales tax.

Section 3 - HEADCOUNT
Client shall provide final guaranteed headcount no later than August 1, 2026.
If final headcount is not received by this date, menu selections will revert
to the standard buffet package at prevailing rates.

Section 4 - EXCLUSIVITY
4.1 Caterer has the exclusive right to provide all food and beverage services
within the Pennsylvania Convention Center during the event period.
4.2 No outside food or beverage vendors, food trucks, or catering services
may operate within the licensed premises without prior written consent of
both the Caterer and the Pennsylvania Convention Center Authority.

Section 5 - PAYMENT TERMS
All invoices are due net 30 days from date of invoice.
A deposit of 25% of estimated total is due upon execution of this Agreement.
